title: First Subfield Identifier
text: First Subfield Identifier ASCII string that marks the first subfield when using variable-length techniques. Technical Name: Expected Value: String of up to 32 characters. Supports Unicode. Default Value: None Description Use this definition only if the Identification Type species that a string identifier will be used, either alone or in combination with a binary length. To use a nonprinting ASCII character, enter the decimal value of the ASCII string (for example, ^29). Applies to Modeled Field Interface Related Links Variable-Length Fields Variable-length fields store only the actual data in the field, and not the trailing spaces that would be added for a fixed-length field. Identification Type The method used to identify the beginning of a subfield. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
